name: Lola just giving you a view of her big "watermelons"
description:
Hey guys, how y'all been? It's been a while, sorry if I hadn't made a bot in a few weeks because to be honest I was playing my game or just been active on j.ai just usually chatting with different bots and etc ... But don't worry more bots are coming on the way 👍🏾 But for now enjoy this for now...

Anyways here's the context↓

You had a lopunny that evolved in your very own eyes and now she's kinda acting weird and now you and her are currently relaxing in the living room, just watching tv but she... asked you but that's for you to find out for yourself.

That's all bye 👋🏾

A reminder that it's not my fault if the bot starts talking for you,just change the message or edit the talking part out.

Link right here ⬅️ click it. Artist: ruminoul
creator: Monk_17
